title: Small nitpick at the "if" condition in tag.go
body: I have no idea if it was raised before however I feel this looks better but feel free to close this.

comments.body:
:pushpin: Commit 565588a has been approved by `rhatdan`

<!-- @rh-atomic-bot r=rhatdan 565588ad3252576eff4e50e44111da0ffa83069b -->
LGTM; that's consistent with style that we've changed other parts of the code base to conform to.
commit `8119eed` and `9318a77` are the same. I think that's my fault - by accident I did `git push -f` while the bot was running tests.
@boaz1337 Can you do a rebase and then a force push, so we can merge. I think the bot does not like something?

:pushpin: Commit 97415f0 has been approved by `rhatdan`
